parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
=[{"role":"system","content":"You are a task extraction assistant. Extract task details from emails and respond with ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation.

Rules:
- title: concise action item (max 200 chars)
- description: optional context (max 500 chars)
- priority: infer from urgency. 'urgent'/'ASAP'/'critical' → 'high'. 'low priority'/'when you can' → 'low'. Default → 'medium'
- due_date: ISO 8601 if mentioned, null otherwise

Response format: {"title":"...","description":"...","priority":"low|medium|high","due_date":"ISO8601 or null"}"},{"role":"user","content":"Subject: {{ $json.subject }}

Body: {{ $json.body }}"}]

elements.text: Created automatically via Email → Task automation ⚡

meta.description: Watches Gmail inbox, parses email with Groq Llama LLM to extract task title/priority/due-date, creates task in backend, notifies Slack.
